expectations.text: The agent correctly identifies M=512, N=768, K=1024 from the matrix dimensions described
expectations.evidence: strategy.json correctly sets M=512, N=768, K=1024 from 'A is 512x1024 and B is 1024x768'

expectations.text: The strategy correctly identifies that no padding is needed (all dims already in ALLOWED lists)
expectations.evidence: strategy.json sets pad_impl='none', padded dims equal input dims; agent explicitly noted all three are exact ALLOWED values

expectations.text: The strategy block includes dtype: i8 or int8
The strategy source is one of: hashmap_27, sorted_first_fit, preprocessed_map, fallback
expectations.evidence: strategy_source = 'preprocessed_map' — valid choice for exact profile hit

expectations.text: Phase 0 reads from the knowledge base and profiling data
expectations.evidence: Agent reported reading knowledge-base, gemm-data/runs.json, error-logs, rules, and found exact profile key '512_768_1024' in vla_profile_combined.json

expectations.text: The agent completes all 5 phases or explains clearly why a phase was skipped
expectations.evidence: All 5 phases completed: Phase 0 (memory load), Phase 1 (strategy), Phase 2 (simulated NPU run with clear note), Phase 3 (analysis), Phase 4 (runs.json + session log updated)
